name: mc-dp-icons
description: A polished, Minecraft-inspired icon suite for the modern developer's workflow.

mc-dp-icons.workspaceDetection.title: Enable Workspace Detection
mc-dp-icons.workspaceDetection.markdownDescription:
If enabled, the extension scans your workspace for `pack.mcmeta` and automatically applies the `mc-dp-icons` theme if detected. If not, it switches back to your `#mc-dp-icons.fallbackIconTheme#`.

This scan runs on startup and when modifying files.

mc-dp-icons.fallbackIconTheme.title: Fallback Icon Theme
mc-dp-icons.fallbackIconTheme.markdownDescription:
*Requires `#mc-dp-icons.workspaceDetection#` to be enabled.*

Enter the exact ID of the icon theme you want to use for non-Minecraft workspaces (e.g., `vs-seti` or `material-icon-theme`).

If blank, the extension defaults to the icon theme that was active before `mc-dp-icons` was applied.

mc-dp-icons.dynamicFunctionIcons.title: Dynamic Function Icons
mc-dp-icons.dynamicFunctionIcons.markdownDescription:
If enabled, functions listed in your `tick.json` and `load.json` files automatically receive repeating and impulse command block icons.

Disable this to manually assign these icons using the name lists below.

*Warning: This feature is not currently supported on VS Code Web.*

mc-dp-icons.loadFunctionNames.title: Load function names
mc-dp-icons.loadFunctionNames.markdownDescription:
*Requires `#mc-dp-icons.dynamicFunctionIcons#` to be disabled.*

Enter the file names (without `.mcfunction`) that should receive the **impulse command block** icon.

**Wildcards are supported:** Use `*` to match multiple files. For example, `setup_*` will match `setup_game.mcfunction` and `setup_settings.mcfunction`.

*Warning: This feature is not currently supported on VS Code Web.*

mc-dp-icons.tickFunctionNames.title: Tick function names
mc-dp-icons.tickFunctionNames.markdownDescription:
*Requires `#mc-dp-icons.dynamicFunctionIcons#` to be disabled.*

Enter the file names (without `.mcfunction`) that should receive the **repeating command block** icon.

**Wildcards are supported:** Use `*` to match multiple files. For example, `*_loop` will match `game_loop.mcfunction` and `particle_loop.mcfunction`.

*Warning: This feature is not currently supported on VS Code Web.*

mc-dp-icons.crownedFunctions.title: Crowned Functions
mc-dp-icons.crownedFunctions.markdownDescription:
Enter the file names (without `.mcfunction`) that should receive the **crowned chain command block** icon.

**Wildcards are supported:** Use `*` to match multiple files. For example, `*utils*` matches `math_utils.mcfunction` and `utils-parser.mcfunction`.

mc-dp-icons.crownedTickFunctions.title: Crowned Tick Functions
mc-dp-icons.crownedTickFunctions.markdownDescription:
Enter the file names (without `.mcfunction`) that receive the **crowned repeating command block** icon.

**Wildcards are supported:** Use `*` to match multiple files. For example, `*_main` matches `combat_main.mcfunction` and `spawn_main.mcfunction`.

mc-dp-icons.crownedLoadFunctions.title: Crowned Load Functions
mc-dp-icons.crownedLoadFunctions.markdownDescription:
Enter the file names (without `.mcfunction`) that receive the **crowned impulse command block** icon.

**Wildcards are supported:** Use `*` to match multiple files. For example, `init_*` matches `init_scoreboards.mcfunction` and `init_entities.mcfunction`.

mc-dp-icons.namespaceIcons.title: Changes namespace folders icons to an ender chest
mc-dp-icons.namespaceIcons.markdownDescription:
If enabled, namespace folders (folders directly within `data` and `assets`) will change their icons to ender chests. Works only if there is `pack.mcmeta` in the same directory.

*Warning: this feature is not currently supported for VS Code web.*

mc-dp-icons.overlayIcons.title: Changes overlay folders icons to glass chest

mc-dp-icons.subfolderIcons.title: Enable subfolder icons
mc-dp-icons.subfolderIcons.markdownDescription:
If enabled, json files inside namespace subfolders will also change their icons (e.g. `data/namespace/item_modifier/some_folder/file.json` will change its icon to a diamond pickaxe when this is enabled). Not recommended for large workspaces. Works only if there is `pack.mcmeta` in the same directory.

*Warning: this feature is not currently supported for VS Code web.*

mc-dp-icons.christmasIcons.title: Use Christmas icons
mc-dp-icons.christmasIcons.markdownDescription:
Choose when to use Christmas icons.

*Warning: this feature is not currently supported for VS Code web.*

mc-dp-icons.hideFolderArrows.title: Hide folder arrows
mc-dp-icons.hideFolderArrows.markdownDescription:
If enabled, the extension will hide folder arrows in the explorer.

*Warning: this feature is not currently supported for VS Code web.*

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
